name: Melty Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup cooked, peeled, and chopped potato
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in a blender with enough water to cover until smooth.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and blend again until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a heavy saucepan and cook over medium-high heat, stirring constantly for about 7 to 8 minutes.
4. The mixture will thicken to the consistency of nacho cheese. Serve immediately as the "cheese" will set upon cooling.
